title: Core Components of a Blockchain (Based on Mastering Blockchain)
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental architectural components of a blockchain and how they interact to form a secure and decentralized ledger, as explained in Module 5.
relationships: Transactions are bundled into a Block
A Block's header contains the Hash of the previous block, forming a chain
The new Block is broadcast to the Network
Network Nodes validate the Block via Consensus
Validated Block is added to every node's copy of the ledger
